steps.title: Find the linear rate
steps.content: From 1996 to 2016 (20 years), the population goes from 61 to 225 thousand. The slope is $$m=\frac{225-61}{2016-1996}=\frac{164}{20}=8.2 \text{ thousand/year}.$$

steps.title: Predict the requested value
steps.content: From 2016 to 2020 is 4 years, so add $8.2\cdot 4=32.8$ thousand to the 2016 value: $$x=225+32.8=257.8 \approx 258.$$ The answer is 258.
